## Summary
Describe the Terraform change and why it is needed.

## Target Environment
- [ ] dev
- [ ] stage
- [ ] prod

## Promotion Type
- [ ] feature to dev
- [ ] dev to stage
- [ ] stage to prod
- [ ] emergency fix

## Risk
Describe deployment risk, user impact, and any expected downtime.

## Validation
Describe what was tested locally or in a lower environment.

## Rollback
Describe how to revert safely if the deployment fails.

## Notes
Include anything reviewers should know, such as IAM, networking, or security implications.
